default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, publishing process, and performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two articles ready for publishing; GrowthX to share Google Docs for Rapyd to convert to HTML](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Rapyd to set up special browser access for GrowthX team member to publish content directly](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [GrowthX adjusting content tone and integrating Rapyd-specific insights into articles](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Rapyd to share brand messaging guidelines and industry perspectives for more targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Performance reporting set up in Looker Studio; traffic projections and conversion estimates in progress](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Process

  - [GrowthX to share articles as Google Docs for Rapyd to convert to HTML](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Rapyd IT to set up special browser access for one GrowthX team member (likely Aida or Rachel) to publish directly](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Stock photos to be used initially; image generation to be implemented later](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Four articles ready for review, one more coming tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)

### Content Strategy and Branding

  - [GrowthX adjusting tone in polishing instructions for more straightforward content](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Rapyd to share brand messaging guidelines, including ICP insights and pain points](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Discussion on integrating Rapyd-specific content:](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
      - [Multiple CTAs throughout articles (3 per article, strategically placed)](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [Integrate Rapyd solutions into content without being salesy](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Highlight Rapyd's unique value propositions:](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
        1.  Direct card acquiring (no middleman)
        2.  Card issuing capabilities
        3.  Payments and payouts on a single platform
        4.  Focus on "high opportunity" industries (e.g., iGaming, cryptocurrency, forex) rather than "high risk"

### Performance Tracking and Reporting

  - [Looker Studio dashboard set up for content performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
  - [Includes data from Google Search Console, Google Analytics 4, and LLM referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Potential discrepancy noted in LLM referral traffic data; Aida to investigate](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Jacob working on traffic projections and conversion estimates](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)

### Next Steps for Content Creation

  - [GrowthX to incorporate Rapyd's unique perspectives into content](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Rapyd to review upcoming articles in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Jacob to refine traffic and conversion projections with more accurate data](https://fathom.video/share/8pC1BzzPUGqtnQiBzfHv6CGbKYME9s3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)

## Next Steps
